production_note: live dual-LLM agentic solve from sequential packets only
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
print(list(range(3)))
print(list(range(1, 4)))
print(list(range(0, 10, 2)))
exercises.justification_from_packet: range(n) produce 0..n-1; list(range(3)) es [0,1,2]. range(stop), range(start,stop), range(start,stop,step).

exercises.code:
total = 0
for n in range(1, 6):
    total += n
print(total)
exercises.justification_from_packet: range(n) produce 0..n-1; list(range(3)) es [0,1,2]. Acumulador con for sobre range(1,6) → 15.

exercises.code:
# off-by-one: range(len(xs)) vs range(1, len(xs)+1)
xs = ["a", "b", "c"]
print("indices 0-based:", list(range(len(xs))))
print("human 1-based labels:", list(range(1, len(xs) + 1)))
for i, v in enumerate(xs, start=1):
    print(i, v)
exercises.justification_from_packet: range(n) produce 0..n-1; list(range(3)) es [0,1,2]. enumerate(start=1) evita off-by-one en etiquetas humanas.
range(n) produce 0..n-1; list(range(3)) es [0,1,2]. enumerate da índice y valor sin range(len).

exercises.code:
ids = ["C001", "C002", "C003"]
scores = [10, 20]
print("sin strict:", list(zip(ids, scores)))
try:
    list(zip(ids, scores, strict=True))
except ValueError as e:
    print("strict ValueError:", type(e).__name__)
exercises.justification_from_packet: zip sin strict recorta al más corto; el resto se pierde en silencio. zip recorta; strict=True lanza ValueError si longitudes difieren.

exercises.code:
headers = ["id", "monto"]
row = ["C001", "10.5", "extra"]
# columnas de más → cuarentena
if len(row) != len(headers):
    print("quarantine: shape", len(row), "vs", len(headers))
else:
    print(dict(zip(headers, row)))
exercises.justification_from_packet: zip sin strict recorta al más corto; el resto se pierde en silencio. Shape roto no se zippea en silencio; cuarentena con motivo.
range(n) produce 0..n-1; list(range(3)) es [0,1,2]. Indexing y slicing: primero, último, rebanada, step 2.

print("hola" in text)

exercises.code:
rows = [{"id": "C1", "ok": True}, {"id": "C2", "ok": False}, {"id": "C3", "ok": True}]
kept = []
for r in rows:
    if not r["ok"]:
        continue
    kept.append(r["id"])
print(kept)
exercises.justification_from_packet: continue salta al siguiente ciclo del for; break sale del bucle. continue salta filas no ok y sigue el for.
continue salta al siguiente ciclo del for; break sale del bucle. break termina el bucle al hallar n==5.
continue salta al siguiente ciclo del for; break sale del bucle. for-else corre solo si el bucle no se cortó con break.

exercises.code:
n_total, n_reject = 100, 7
rate = n_reject / n_total
print(round(rate, 4))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. Tasa reject = n_reject/n_total de procesados.
Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. Denominador es n_total = accept+review+reject.

exercises.code:
# Error: usar solo n_accept como denominador infla/deflacta mal la tasa
n_accept, n_reject = 50, 10
bad = n_reject / n_accept
good = n_reject / (n_accept + 30 + n_reject)  # + reviews
print("bad", bad, "good", round(good, 4))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. Denominador debe ser n_total, no solo accepts.

exercises.code:
from collections import Counter
statuses = ["accept", "reject", "accept", "review", "reject"]
c = Counter(statuses)
print(dict(c))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Counter agrega frecuencias de estados del gate. Esto sale del paquete activo de la sección y del iDo/teoría del curso, sin ejecución local.

exercises.code:
rows = [
    {"region": "Lima", "status": "accept"},
    {"region": "Lima", "status": "reject"},
    {"region": "Cusco", "status": "accept"},
]
from collections import defaultdict
agg = defaultdict(lambda: {"n": 0, "reject": 0})
for r in rows:
    a = agg[r["region"]]
    a["n"] += 1
    if r["status"] == "reject":
        a["reject"] += 1
for reg, a in sorted(agg.items()):
    print(reg, a["reject"] / a["n"])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. Reject rate por región con agregación.

exercises.code:
# KPI del gate: no optimizar solo accept_rate sin mirar review y datos missing
print("kpis: accept_rate, review_rate, reject_rate, missing_rate")
print("alerta si reject_rate > 0.2 o missing_rate > 0.1")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. KPIs balanceados; umbrales de alerta operativos.

exercises.code:
# O(1) lookup dict vs O(n) scan list
ids = [f"C{i:03d}" for i in range(5)]
print("list membership conceptual O(n)")
print("set membership conceptual O(1)", "C003" in set(ids))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Doble for anidado sobre n es O(n²) aproximado. Contraste O(n) list vs O(1) set para membership.

exercises.code:
# doble for → O(n²)
n = 4
count = 0
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(n):
        count += 1
print("ops", count, "≈ n²", n * n)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Doble for anidado sobre n es O(n²) aproximado. Doble for anidado produce n² operaciones.

exercises.code:
# Evitar O(n²): indexar por id una vez
rows = [{"id": "C1", "v": 1}, {"id": "C2", "v": 2}]
idx = {r["id"]: r for r in rows}
print(idx["C2"])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Doble for anidado sobre n es O(n²) aproximado. Dict por id evita búsquedas anidadas O(n²).

Tasa de reject = n_reject / n_total de registros procesados, no solo accepts. Mini-gate produce estados para métricas posteriores.
